bluetooth_confirm.title: Euhomy BLE Device Detected
bluetooth_confirm.description:
Found **{name}** ({address}).

Confirm to continue and enter your Tuya local key.

local_key.title: Tuya Local Key
local_key.description:
Enter the 16-character Tuya local key for your device.

**How to get it:**
1. Install the **Tuya Smart** app and re-pair your CFC-25.
2. Log in at https://iot.tuya.com → Cloud → Devices.
3. Find your device and copy its **Local Key**.

Alternatively, link your Euhomy account to a Tuya IoT developer project.

abort.no_devices_found: No Euhomy BLE devices found nearby

error.invalid_local_key_length: The local key must be exactly 16 characters
